_note: Fantasy / game-character versions of you. Warrior, mage, rogue, game poster hero. IP-Adapter FaceID keeps your face while the prompt transforms the setting and outfit. Great for social content, profile images, game-themed thumbnails.
template: epic fantasy portrait of {subject} as a {character_class}, {scene}, {palette} palette, {lighting}, intricate armor and costume detail, cinematic game art quality, dramatic depth, 8K detail
negative: text, letters, words, watermark, blurry, low quality, deformed face, extra limbs, generic, bland, modern clothing, office setting, different person

scene: ancient throne room with shafts of light
battlefield at dusk with fire and smoke
mountain fortress overlooking a vast kingdom
lighting: dramatic god rays through stone arches
campfire rim light with warm shadows

rubric.identity: 1-5 — does this look like the same person as the reference?
rubric.hook: 1-5 — would this work as a profile image?
